text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Child Guidance * Mental Health Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child/Adolescent Sex Offenders Mental Health Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL ADOLESCENT AND CHILD PSYCHIATRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and consultation for a range of childhood mental health disorders. Services include diagnostic evaluation, parent guidance, child and adolescent therapy/counseling, family therapy/counseling, medication evaluation, and treatment. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 3-19 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 346-0640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU ADOLESCENT AND CHILD PSYCHIATRY
